title: The Blind Goddess
writer: Arthur Chesney Train, Louis D. Lighton, Hope Loring
actors: Jack Holt, Ernest Torrence, Esther Ralston
plot: Hugh Dillon, a young lawyer, becomes a public prosecutor in New York City, and is soon forced to choose between his idealistic view of duty, and Moria Evans, the girl he loves, under circumstances, that seem to spell the end of hi...
